data.title: AlphaGen Intelligence Corp. concludes the LIFE offering with a successful closure.
data.description: Last month, a new report revealed that the global unemployment rate reached 6.7%, affecting a total of 218 million people. The report highlighted that the COVID-19 pandemic continues to have a significant impact on job markets worldwide, with youth unemployment being particularly high at 13.1%. Additionally, the report indicated that the income loss for workers during the pandemic was estimated at 8.8% globally, equivalent to $3.7 trillion. These figures underscore the ongoing challenges faced by economies and labor markets as they strive to recover from the effects of the health crisis.

data.title: CASEKOO introduces 'Tribute to Artists' series at West Bund Museum Art Store in Shanghai. Tech meets art world.
data.description: On October 17, 2025, in Los Angeles, CASEKOO, a leading tech accessories brand, revealed its entrance into the art world with the introduction of the "Tribute to Artists" series at the West Bund Museum Art Store in Shanghai, China. This exclusive collection signifies a significant move for the company into a new market segment.

data.title: Citius Pharmaceuticals & Citius Oncology to participate in October 2025 conferences: LD Micro Main Event XIX, Maxim Growth Summit, and Think Equity Conference.
data.description: From October 19th to 21st, 2025, LD Micro Main Event XIX will take place, followed by the 2025 Maxim Growth Summit on October 22nd and 23rd. Additionally, The Think Equity Conference is scheduled for October 30th, 2025. CRANFORD, N.J., Oct. 17, 2025 /PRNewswire/ -- Citius Pharmaceuticals, Inc. and Citius Oncology, Inc., traded under Nasdaq as CTXR and CTOR respectively, shared an important announcement today.

data.title: Methode Electronics approves dividend of $0.05 per share, to be paid to stockholders on Oct 31, 2025.
data.description: On October 17, 2025, a company known as Methode Electronics, Inc. made an announcement that it declared a quarterly dividend of $0.05 per share for its common stockholders. The payment is scheduled to be made on October 31, 2025, to those stockholders who are officially registered by the end of business hours on October 29, 2025. Methode Electronics, Inc., listed on the NYSE as MEI, is globally recognized for providing tailored solutions for user interface, lighting, and power distribution needs.

data.title: Granite REIT declared distribution of CDN $0.2833 per unit for October 2025, payable on Nov 14 to unitholders of record.
data.description: In Toronto, Granite Real Estate Investment Trust (GRT.UN / GRP.U) revealed a distribution of CDN $0.2833 per unit for October 2025. The payout will be made on November 14, 2025, to unitholders on record as of October 31, 2025. It was ensured that none of the distribution is considered effectively connected income for U.S. federal tax reasons.

data.title: Mawson Finland highlights $80M financing closing by First Nordic; shareholder meeting set; loan announced.
data.description: VANCOUVER, British Columbia, on October 17, 2025 - Mawson Finland Limited, also known as Mawson, announced the successful completion of First Nordic Metals Corp.’s financial deal. First Nordic, listed under TSX-V: FNM, FNSE: FNMC SDB, OTCQX: FNMCF, FRA: HEG0, secured a total of $80 million through a combination of brokered and non-brokered offerings of subscription receipts valued at $0.38 per receipt. For more information on this transaction, refer to First Nordic’s press release issued on October 15, 2025.

data.title: GreenFirst (TSX: GFP) welcomes Kap Paper Inc.'s restart of operations, showing government support for Northern Ontario jobs.
data.description: GreenFirst Forest Products Inc. (TSX: GFP) expressed satisfaction with the reopening of Kap Paper Inc. in North Bay, Ontario. This event signifies the successful partnership between the federal and provincial governments as they work together to bolster Northern Ontario communities and the Canadian forestry industry. The reinstatement of operations at Kap Paper is deemed crucial in providing stability to the region.

data.title: Arctera named Leader in 2025 Gartner Magic Quadrant for Digital Communications Governance & Archiving Solutions.
data.description: Arctera, a renowned data management company based in Pleasanton, California, has recently been acknowledged as a Leader in the 2025 Gartner Magic Quadrant for Digital Communications Governance and Archiving Solutions (DCGA). This marks the second year in a row that Arctera has received this recognition. The company's placement in the quadrant is attributed to its innovative Arctera Insight Platform, which seamlessly integrates information governance, eDiscovery, and surveillance functionalities. This achievement underscores Arctera's commitment to leveraging cutting-edge technologies such as advanced AI, automation, and natural language processing to deliver top-notch solutions in the field.
